summary: Weekly CRM audit: missing fields, duplicate-looking contacts and inconsistent records, with proposed fixes queued for approval.

definition.name: Data quality auditor
definition.description: Weekly audit: scout profiles the CRM for gaps (missing emails/amounts, stale records, duplicate-looking contacts) and builds an audit view; ledger proposes record fixes for the worst offenders. Every proposed fix is a Greenlight draft.

greenlight.note: Audit fixes are proposals only; nothing mutates the CRM without approval.
